//: Pyright config for the non-MCP Python (IC generators, Scripts/, Tests/Fixtures/). Invoked explicitly via `pyright -p pyrightconfig.nonmcp.json`; the non-standard filename is deliberately NOT auto-discovered, so the MCP/Client `pyright .` run keeps its own defaults. extraPaths supply the two import roots: mcp_client under MCP/Client and the generators' sibling modules.
